title: Manga Editions
wikitext:
[]: Manga Editions?             Quote Post by Maya Ibuki » Tue May 22, 2012 3:35 am Hello. I've started reading the manga version of Evangelion, as my school stocked them in. However, I noticed that some of the volumes are in the form of Graphic Novels and comics? It also seems that there are several editions? Could anyone explain the differences between the versions, and the history? Is one more definitive? I'm interested in starting my own collection hence me asking this. Thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue May 22, 2012 3:58 am Take a look at this thread: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/3296/MANGA-NGE-Special-Collectors-Edition-vs-normal/

Article: Manga Editions
[]: Manga Editions?             Quote Post by Maya Ibuki » Tue May 22, 2012 3:35 am Hello. I've started reading the manga version of Evangelion, as my school stocked them in. However, I noticed that some of the volumes are in the form of Graphic Novels and comics? It also seems that there are several editions? Could anyone explain the differences between the versions, and the history? Is one more definitive? I'm interested in starting my own collection hence me asking this. Thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue May 22, 2012 3:58 am Take a look at this thread: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/3296/MANGA-NGE-Special-Collectors-Edition-vs-normal/
